# Plan 4.4 — OpenAPI Documentation

**Goal:** FastAPI auto-generated OpenAPI with descriptive summaries.

**Tasks:**
1. Create `ethos_os/main.py` with FastAPI app
2. Include all routers with descriptive tags
3. Add summary/description to all endpoints
4. Add example requests/responses where helpful
5. Swagger UI at /docs, ReDoc at /redoc

**Dependencies:** All API routers (plans 4.1, 4.2, 4.3)

**Agent:** @frontend-developer

**Success Criteria:**
- OpenAPI docs accessible at /docs
- All endpoints have summaries
- ReDoc alternative at /redoc
- API-05 requirement met
